# logs

The read-only viewer for persistent log channels. The substrate (the `clientLog`
emitter, the server `Log`/persist/registry, and the `/api/logs/*` + `/ws/logs`
routes) now lives in the `primitives/log-channels` primitive — see
[`plugins/primitives/plugins/log-channels/CLAUDE.md`](../../../primitives/plugins/log-channels/CLAUDE.md).
This plugin only contributes the Logs sidebar entry and the panes that render
those channels (`tail`/`cat` the `.jsonl` files directly for raw access).

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: System logs pane, opened from the Debug sidebar.
- Web:
  - Contributes: `Pane.Register` "logs", `Pane.Register` "logs-channel", `DebugApp.Sidebar` "Logs" → `component`
